_comment: Reference for required configuration. appsettings.json ships with empty strings; real values come from Azure App Service Configuration or dotnet user-secrets for local dev. Never commit real secrets.

DevAuth._note: Development-only bypass — gated by IsDevelopment(). Must stay disabled (or absent) in all non-Development configs.

Frontend._note: Web origin(s) for CORS and notification links. Several can be listed separated by ',' or ';' (e.g. during a domain cutover); the first is the canonical base for generated links. Production: https://projectman.softim.cz

Sync._note: Email-to-ticket sync (#49). Needs Entra app registration with Mail.ReadWrite application permission granted on the shared mailbox. ClientSecret must come from Azure App Service Configuration or user-secrets, never commit.
